---
name: Security report (non-sensitive)
about: Report a potential security concern that is safe to discuss publicly.
title: "security: "
labels: security
---

> [!IMPORTANT]
> If this is a real vulnerability, **do not** post exploit details publicly.
> Use private reporting instead:
> https://github.com/Talhamehar007/screen-capture/security/advisories/new

## Summary

Describe the concern at a high level.

## Why this matters

Explain potential impact.

## Public-safe details

Share only non-sensitive details. Do not include credentials, private paths, or sensitive screenshots.

## Suggested mitigation

Describe possible fixes or safeguards.
